What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man in a grey suit sits on the left side of a news desk while a woman in a black dress sits on the right. Two black laptops are open on the desk in front of them. Behind the anchors, a nighttime city skyline with illuminated buildings is visible. Digital graphics overlay the bottom of the screen displaying the time and temperature.

question: How many black laptops are visible on the desk?

Describe the visual progression of the broadcast, identifying when the logo animation ends, when the anchors first appear, and when the texting demonstration begins and ends.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the FOX 5 NEWS logo assembles against a city skyline; at 2s, the logo settles on a glossy floor; at 4s, a man and woman appear at a news desk with laptops; at 8s, the view cuts to hands holding a smartphone for a texting segment; at 16s, the broadcast returns to the anchors at the desk.
